editorial_accuracy.notes: 31 chapters with evidence tiers, cross-links, reading time. No content changes this run.

information_design.notes: Canonical link tags per-page. Donation CTAs on methodology + sources. Social sharing dropdown.

ui_ux_typography.notes: Social share dropdown (X, LinkedIn, Email, native). Bookmarks empty state icon. 44pt mobile targets.

code_quality.notes: Zero TS errors. No hardcoded bg-white in dark mode paths. Semantic CSS variables throughout.

accessibility.notes: Escape key on share dropdown + auth modal. role=dialog, aria-modal, aria-expanded. 44pt touch targets. Print hides interactive elements.

security.notes: No regressions. All external links use noopener noreferrer.
